pages.title: Enderman
pages.text: $(rev)Corpus entry:$(warn) fragments torn from Enderman donors keep their cultural locomotion hints even when stitched elsewhere.

pages.title: Recorded anatomy
pages.text: Full biped set: Head, Torso, Arms, Legs.

pages.title: Stitcher's marginalia
pages.text: $(rev)Head:$(warn) may blink the wearer away when struck — excellent panic button, risky near cliffs.
